questions.question: Describe the key characteristics of the Chalk and Talk method, and how it differs from the PowerPoint Presentation method. (10 marks)
What are the advantages and disadvantages of using PowerPoint Presentations in the classroom, and how can teachers optimize their use of this method to enhance student learning? (15 marks)
Explain how the Chalk and Talk method can be adapted to accommodate different learning styles and needs, and provide an example of how this might be achieved in a geometry lesson. (12 marks)
